message.content:
@startuml
title af sync strategy [[ReferencePage]]\nStrategy:\n1. AF_FOLLOWER_COARSE_FOLLOW\n2. AF_FOLLOWER_COMPLETE_FOLLOW\n3. AF_FOLLOWER_SEQUENTIAL_FOLLOW tuning file not contain

box "Follower" #pink
participant af_haf_follower #red
end box

participant af_core #yellow
participant af_haf #yellow
participant camxhafadapter
participant af_haf_default_mixer #yellow
participant af_haf_follower #red

== how the follower create ==

af_core -> af_core : af_haf_set_core_switch
af_core -> af_haf : pAlgo->set_parameters\n  type: AF_HAF_SET_PARAM_PEER_FOCUS_INFO
af_haf -> af_haf_default_mixer : af_default_mixer_set_parameters
af_haf_default_mixer -> af_haf_default_mixer
note right of af_haf_default_mixer
if !master:
  pMixer->p_primary = pMixer->p_follower_algo
else
  pMixer->p_primary = pMixer->p_active_algo
end note
af_haf_default_mixer --> af_haf : return
af_haf --> af_core : return

== af process monitor ==

af_core -> af_core : af_follower_process_monitor
note right of af_haf_default_mixer
checked with Lester
for follower_monitor, has no different
for follower_search,
current we use LEGACY, and Direct mapping require module calibration data
end note

alt [lens_mapping_method = FOLLOWER_LEGACY_MAPPING]
else [lens_mapping_method = FOLLOWER_DIRECT_MAPPING]
end

af_core <-- af_core : return

== af process search ==

af_core -> af_core : af_follower_process_search
af_core -> af_haf_follower : af_follower_focus_converge
af_haf_follower --> af_core

note right of af_haf_default_mixer : just talk about the FOLLOWER_DIRECT_MAPPING

alt [case AF_FOLLOWER_COARSE_FOLLOW]
af_core -> af_haf_follower : af_follower_focus_coarse_follow_dir_map
af_haf_follower --> af_core
note right of af_haf_default_mixer
1. if Coarse search ongoing,  Fine search not in process
   go to the target lenspos
2. if enter fine search, setup fine search
   follower have seperate fine search Tuning Param
end note

else [case AF_FOLLOWER_COMPLETE_FOLLOW]
af_core -> af_haf_follower : af_follower_focus_complete_follow_dir_map
af_haf_follower --> af_core
note right of af_haf_default_mixer
once master focusStatus is FOCUSED
we directly set LensPos
end note

else [case AF_FOLLOWER_SEQUENTIAL_FOLLOW]
af_core -> af_haf_follower : af_follower_focus_sequential_follow_dir_map
af_haf_follower --> af_core
note right of af_haf_default_mixer
just like COMPLETE_FOLLOW, but even master is focus done
will do another fine search
end note
end

af_haf_follower --> af_core : return
af_haf_follower <-- af_haf_follower

af_core -> af_haf_follower : af_follower_get_fine_range
af_haf_follower --> af_core : return

af_core -> af_haf_follower : af_follower_populate_process_search_output
af_haf_follower --> af_core : return

af_core <-- af_core : return

@enduml
